name: Enchilada Sauce/Chicken Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, sauté flour in oil for one minute.
2. Add spices and cook for an additional minute.
3. Stir in broth, tomato sauce, and lime juice until the mixture boils.
4. Continue boiling constantly until thickened.
5. Assemble tortillas with chicken and cooked onion, placing them side by side in a pan coated with the sauce.
6. When the pan is full, pour additional sauce over top and sprinkle grated cheddar cheese on top.
7. Bake in an oven until warmed through and the cheese has melted.
8. Serve on a bed of lettuce and accompany with sour cream, salsa, and jalapeno peppers to the side.
